metadata.important_note: This JSON contains verified business setup knowledge only.
metadata.location_focus: Al Qua'a, Al Ain, Abu Dhabi, UAE

authorities.name: Abu Dhabi Registration Authority / Department of Economic Development
authorities.role: Economic licences, trade names, legal forms, business activities, business registration in Abu Dhabi

working_hours.note: ADRA contact page lists opening hours as 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM.

authorities.name: Abu Dhabi Agriculture and Food Safety Authority
authorities.role: Food safety, food product registration, agriculture, livestock, farm and food-related approvals

working_hours.note: ADAFSA contact pages list official working hours for Abu Dhabi, Al Ain and Al Dhafra offices.

relevant_services: No objection certificate for agriculture, livestock breeding or food production

authorities.name: Department of Culture and Tourism Abu Dhabi
authorities.role: Tourism-related licences, tourism classifications, tour operator licensing, travel agent licensing, tourist guide training and licensing

authorities.name: Khalifa Fund for Enterprise Development
authorities.role: Funding, entrepreneurship support, SME support, training and funding schemes mainly for eligible Emirati entrepreneurs

authorities.name: Emirates Development Bank
authorities.role: Development finance, including AgriTech loan programme for farms, growers and food suppliers

authorities.name: Abu Dhabi Investment Office
authorities.role: Financial and non-financial incentives, access to capital, markets and partnerships, especially for innovation and high-growth sectors

authorities.name: Authority of Social Contribution - Ma'an
authorities.role: Social investment, social incubator, grants and support for social-impact startups

licenses.name: Tajer Abu Dhabi Licence

service_hours.authority_support_hours: ADRA listed opening hours: 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM

costs.included_activity_note: The base AED 790 cost includes up to 6 investor-selected activities.
costs.fee_warning: Final fee depends on selected economic activities, legal form and any extra approvals.

activity_options_for_founder: Food product trading, if food approvals are satisfied

eligibility.citizen_vs_resident_note: ADRA describes Tajer as ideal for one-person companies owned by Emiratis or GCC nationals, and LLCs owned by residents in partnership with Emiratis.

office_requirement.note: No office is required for the first three years.

step_sequence: Fill out application forms through TAMM
licenses.concrete_next_action: Search and reserve a trade name, then apply for Tajer Abu Dhabi through TAMM using UAE PASS.

licenses.name: Standard Economic Licence
best_for: retail business with office or shop

service_hours.authority_support_hours: ADRA listed opening hours: 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM

costs.included_activity_note: The base AED 1,200 cost includes up to 6 investor-selected activities.
costs.fee_warning: Final cost depends on activity, legal form, approvals, lease/Tawtheeq and other service fees.

activity_options_for_founder: Tourism or experience-related activity, if DCT approval is satisfied

eligibility.citizen_vs_resident_note: ADRA describes it as ideal for UAE nationals or residents with companies in partnership with UAE nationals.

office_requirement.note: Office space is required, but ADRA says it may be optional in the first year for some economic activities.

licenses.concrete_next_action: Use TAMM Business Licence Procedure or ADRA activity search to confirm activity requirements and calculated fees before applying.

licenses.name: Farm Licence / Farms and Small Producers Licence

service_hours.authority_support_hours: ADRA listed opening hours: 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM

costs.included_activity_note: The Farm Licence cost range includes up to 6 investor-selected activities.
costs.fee_warning: Final fee depends on economic activities and legal form.

activity_options_for_founder: Farm product packing or preparation, if approvals are satisfied
Farm supply or farm support service

eligible_groups: UAE citizens who own private farms
UAE citizens with estate lease contracts from Department of Municipalities and Transport
eligibility.citizen_vs_resident_note: This licence is specifically for eligible UAE citizens who own or lease farms.

office_requirement.note: No office is required, but the founder must own or lease a farm.

required_documents: Deed to farm or proof of farm ownership
possible_extra_approvals: ADAFSA approvals may be needed for agriculture, livestock or food production activities.
step_sequence: Confirm farm ownership or lease proof
Obtain ADAFSA approval or NOC if required
licenses.concrete_next_action: Check farm ownership or lease document first; without that, do not recommend this licence.

licenses.name: Abu Dhabi Freelancer Licence

service_hours.authority_support_hours: ADRA listed opening hours: 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM

costs.included_activity_note: The base AED 1,200 cost includes up to 6 investor-selected activities.
costs.fee_warning: Fees depend on economic activities and legal form.

activity_options_for_founder: Training or tutoring service, if allowed

eligibility.citizen_vs_resident_note: Available to UAE nationals and residents with specialised skills, including people in full-time jobs if requirements are satisfied.

step_sequence: Apply through TAMM using UAE PASS
licenses.concrete_next_action: Classify the skill as a freelance service and check if certificates or NOC are required.

licenses.name: Mobdea Licence

service_hours.authority_support_hours: ADRA listed opening hours: 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM

costs.included_activity_condition: The 2 selected activities must be similar in nature.
costs.included_activity_note: The base AED 860 cost includes up to 2 investor-selected activities.

eligible_groups: Female UAE nationals residing in Abu Dhabi
eligibility.citizen_vs_resident_note: This licence is limited to female UAE nationals residing in Abu Dhabi.

step_sequence: Confirm founder is eligible Emirati female residing in Abu Dhabi
Select up to two similar activities
licenses.concrete_next_action: Check if the founder is eligible for Mobdea and whether the two selected activities are similar in nature.

licenses.name: Instant Licence

service_hours.authority_support_hours: ADRA listed opening hours: 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM

costs.included_activity_note: The Instant Licence cost range includes up to 6 investor-selected activities.
costs.fee_warning: Fees depend on economic activities and legal form.

step_sequence: Check if activity is eligible for Instant Licence
Submit remaining required documents within allowed period if applicable
licenses.concrete_next_action: Use TAMM/ADRA activity search to confirm whether the selected activity is eligible for Instant Licence.

service_hours.critical_support: 24/7 for lost/stolen card or suspected fraud

plan_options.currency: AED only according to Mbank FAQ

plan_options.best_for: Businesses needing current account features, payments and day-to-day operations

banks.notes: Good first recommendation when founder needs lowest-cost account and only AED account is enough.

contact.support_note: Wio advertises help through its digital platform.
contact.address: Etihad Airways Centre, 5th Floor, Abu Dhabi, UAE

included_features: Up to 3% interest in Saving Spaces

banks.notes: Good for founders who prefer digital banking, invoicing, app access and multi-user tools.

best_for: small business with fixed monthly fee

plan_options.best_for: Small digital business wanting lower monthly fee
Business needing more features and higher usage
Business wanting zero-balance account with fixed maintenance fee

plan_options.monthly_fee: No monthly maintenance fee if balance requirement is maintained
plan_options.best_for: Business able to maintain AED 50,000 monthly average balance

banks.notes: Useful if founder wants a known digital business bank and accepts a monthly fee.

service_hours.commercial_contact_centre: 24 hours a day, 7 days a week

plan_options.best_for: Beginner business wanting no minimum balance with established Abu Dhabi bank

plan_options.minimum_balance: No minimum balance according to ADCB e-Business page
plan_options.annual_fee_note: Check current ADCB fee schedule before recommending

required_documents_common: Passport and visa copies of partners/signatories
banks.notes: Good for founders who want an established Abu Dhabi bank and accept monthly account fees.

service_hours.urgent_support: 24/7 for urgent requirements such as card blocking, fraud reporting and transaction disputes
service_hours.general_product_inquiries: Daily 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, including public and national holidays

plan_options.monthly_fee_note: Source says no minimum monthly balance is required. Verify full service charges before final recommendation.
plan_options.best_for: Startups and entrepreneurs wanting zero-balance business account

plan_options.minimum_balance_note: Check current RAKBANK service and price guide
plan_options.best_for: Businesses needing current account features and multi-currency banking

banks.notes: Good for startups wanting zero-balance business banking with possible financing later.

best_for: businesses that can maintain higher balances
founders who prefer Abu Dhabi's largest bank

plan_options.best_for: SME that can maintain minimum balance

banks.notes: Not the first recommendation for very small founders because minimum balances are higher.

required_documents: MOA/POA for Partnership and LLC companies
Assignment letter if POS assignment applies
bank_loans.important_note: This is usually more suitable after the founder has a licence and operating history, not before starting.

best_for: growing business needing fast working capital
bank_loans.important_note: Credit approval is at the sole discretion of the bank.
More suitable for operating businesses than idea-stage founders.

best_for: businesses already receiving card or e-commerce payments
bank_loans.important_note: Useful later after the business has payment history.

best_for: businesses using letters of credit or guarantees
bank_loans.important_note: This is for more advanced businesses, not the first licence step.

best_for: projects with cost up to AED 1 million
government_investments_and_funds.eligibility_note: Khalifa Fund support is mainly for eligible Emirati entrepreneurs and SMEs. Confirm eligibility on TAMM/Khalifa Fund before recommending.
government_investments_and_funds.concrete_next_action: If founder is Emirati and has a project plan, check Khalifa Fund funding products through TAMM.

government_investments_and_funds.minimum_cash_contribution: No minimum cash contribution according to Khalifa Fund page
government_investments_and_funds.important_note: Use only after confirming founder eligibility and programme status.

government_investments_and_funds.product_name: Financing Fixed Assets - Vehicles and Logistics
Financing Fixed Assets - Machinery and Equipment

government_investments_and_funds.important_note: Use only for eligible licensed Emirati startups in priority sectors.
Best matched to agritech, farming modernization, food production and food security-related projects.
This is more suitable for scalable and innovation-led companies, not a basic microbusiness.
Only recommend if the founder's project has a clear social impact angle.
This is not a simple grant for microbusinesses; it is relevant for startups that can scale.

archetypes.name: Astro-tourism / Desert Experience

setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.license_cost: Use Standard Economic Licence base AED 1,200 plus activity/legal form/external approval costs.
setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.dct_cost_note: Tourism business licence fees may be structured separately; verify current fee through DCT/TAMM before final answer.
setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.bank_cost: Depends on selected bank account plan.

archetypes.eligibility_summary: Can involve UAE nationals or residents depending on legal form and tourism activity. Tourist guide licence requires separate DCT route if guiding personally.
step_sequence: Classify whether this is tour operator, tourist guide, event, or experience business
Apply for economic licence through TAMM
archetypes.concrete_next_action: Do not start with a generic licence. First classify whether the founder is a guide, tour operator, or event/experience organiser.

archetypes.name: Camel Milk / Dairy Product

setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.license_cost: Farm Licence AED 790–5,500 if eligible UAE citizen farm owner/lessee; otherwise Standard Economic Licence base AED 1,200 plus approvals.
setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.food_approval_cost: Verify ADAFSA food product registration and food safety approval fees through TAMM.
setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.bank_cost: Use low-cost bank option for early stage.

archetypes.eligibility_summary: Farm Licence is for UAE citizens who own or lease farms. Food/dairy products may require ADAFSA approvals.
step_sequence: Confirm founder owns/leases farm and is UAE citizen
archetypes.concrete_next_action: Check ADAFSA requirements before selling any dairy product.

archetypes.name: Dates / Honey Product

setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.license_cost: Tajer AED 790–5,500 for online/small trading; Farm Licence AED 790–5,500 if eligible farm producer; Standard base AED 1,200 for bigger setup.
setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.food_approval_cost: Food product registration or ADAFSA approvals may apply; verify by product.

archetypes.eligibility_summary: Choose Farm Licence only if eligible farm owner/lessee; otherwise Tajer or Standard may fit trading/selling.
step_sequence: Decide if founder is producer or reseller
archetypes.concrete_next_action: Classify the founder as producer or reseller first.

archetypes.name: Home Food Business

setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.license_cost: Mobdea AED 860 if eligible Emirati woman and activity fits; Tajer AED 790–5,500 for online/small trading; Standard base AED 1,200 if larger food setup.
setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.food_approval_cost: ADAFSA food safety/product registration requirements must be checked.
setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.bank_cost: Mbank Basic may be lowest-cost; Wio Essential AED 99/month; ADCB SmartStart AED 125+VAT/month.

archetypes.eligibility_summary: Mobdea is limited to Emirati women residing in Abu Dhabi; Tajer may suit online trading; food-related approvals are likely important.
step_sequence: Classify food as home-made, packaged, delivery, catering, or shop
archetypes.concrete_next_action: Before licence selection, identify whether the food is cooked-to-order, packaged product, or catering.

archetypes.name: Tailoring / Henna / Craft

setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.license_cost: Mobdea AED 860 if eligible Emirati woman; Freelancer AED 1,200 for service-based skilled work; Tajer AED 790–5,500 if selling products online.
setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.bank_cost: Mbank basic may be lowest-cost; Wio if digital-first.

archetypes.eligibility_summary: Choose Mobdea if eligible and home-based creative activity; choose Freelancer for service skill; choose Tajer for selling products.
step_sequence: Choose Tajer if mainly product selling
archetypes.concrete_next_action: Ask whether the founder earns by doing the service or by selling finished products.

archetypes.name: Livestock-related Service

setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.license_cost: Farm Licence AED 790–5,500 if eligible; otherwise Standard Licence base AED 1,200 plus approvals.
setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.approval_cost: ADAFSA NOC or other approvals may be required depending on activity.

archetypes.eligibility_summary: Farm Licence requires UAE citizen farm owner/lessee; livestock activities may require ADAFSA-related approvals.
step_sequence: Check whether it falls under Farm Licence or Standard Licence
archetypes.concrete_next_action: Check whether the service involves animal production, veterinary consultancy, training, transport, or trading.

archetypes.name: Small Retail / Online Shop

setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.license_cost: Tajer AED 790–5,500 for small/online trader; Standard base AED 1,200 if physical shop or wider setup.
setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.bank_cost: Mbank basic free/no minimum; Wio Essential AED 99/month; Mashreq NEOBiz Pro AED 99/month.

archetypes.eligibility_summary: Tajer is likely the first path for online/social selling if activity is eligible.
step_sequence: Use Standard Licence if physical shop/office required
archetypes.concrete_next_action: Start with Tajer activity search and trade name search.

archetypes.name: AgriTech

setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.license_cost: Freelancer AED 1,200 for solo technical services; Standard base AED 1,200 for company setup; Farm Licence AED 790–5,500 if eligible farm owner/producer.
setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.funding_note: EDB AgriTech programme may be relevant for farms, growers and food suppliers. ADIO may fit higher-growth innovation-led agritech companies.

archetypes.eligibility_summary: Depends on whether the founder is selling technology service, running a farm project, or building a company.
step_sequence: Classify as software/service, equipment, farm production, or food security project
Check ADAFSA if food/agriculture activity is involved
archetypes.concrete_next_action: Decide whether the agritech idea is a service, product, farm operation, or technology supplier.

archetypes.name: Digital Service / Freelance Work

setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.license_cost: Freelancer AED 1,200 if activity fits; Tajer AED 790–5,500 if selling digital products or online trading.
setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.bank_cost: Wio/Mashreq suit digital founders; Mbank suits low-cost beginner setup.

archetypes.eligibility_summary: Suitable for UAE nationals and residents with skills; some activities may require certificates or NOC.
step_sequence: Check if professional certificate/NOC is required
archetypes.concrete_next_action: Ask the founder to define the service clearly enough to match an ADRA activity.

archetypes.name: Repair / Mobile Local Service

setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.license_cost: Freelancer AED 1,200 if the service activity fits; Standard base AED 1,200 if business needs shop/team/office.
setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.bank_cost: Mbank for low cost; ADCB SmartStart if established local bank is preferred.

archetypes.eligibility_summary: Good generic archetype for phone repair, small maintenance, cleaning, setup, delivery coordination, or local services.
step_sequence: Check if physical shop is needed
archetypes.concrete_next_action: Decide if the service is solo/mobile or requires a shop.

archetypes.name: Training / Tutoring / Workshop

setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.license_cost: Freelancer AED 1,200 if solo professional activity fits; Standard base AED 1,200 or separate training licence route may apply for formal training centre.
setup_and_year_1_cost_logic.bank_cost: Wio for digital service; Mbank for low-cost AED account.

archetypes.eligibility_summary: Depends on whether it is informal skill service, professional tutoring, or formal training centre.
step_sequence: Classify as tutoring, workshop, or formal training centre
Check if education/training approval is required
archetypes.concrete_next_action: Do not recommend licence until the app knows if it is one-person tutoring or a formal training centre.
